0.text: Areas of increased density consistent with scarring in the middle lobe of the right lung

1.text: Areas of increased density consistent with scarring in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

2.text: Well-circumscribed nonspecific parenchymal nodule, 5 mm in diameter, in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Well-circumscribed nonspecific parenchymal nodule, 5 mm in diameter, in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Several nonspecific parenchymal nodules, each 6 mm in diameter, in the anterobasal segment of the left lower lobe
